completion_rule: Every requirement must have status pass in learnforge-v2-product/validation/requirement_results.json. External readiness may be blocked only with BLOCKED_REAL_INTEGRATION_REPORT.md and cannot be marked complete.

requirements.title: Create new project in ./learnforge-v2-product
requirements.acceptance: Project exists with apps/web, services/api, packages/app-protocol, packages/learning-apps, docs, scripts, validation. Legacy project is not patched.

requirements.title: No legacy React Flow as main canvas
requirements.acceptance: React Flow only appears inside knowledge.graph or learning.path graph App implementation, not main canvas root.

requirements.title: No mock/skeleton completion
requirements.acceptance: Runtime success paths do not include forbidden mock/fake/placeholder phrases and health does not report ready for missing providers.

requirements.title: FastAPI backend runtime
requirements.acceptance: services/api exposes FastAPI app with required API routes and OpenAPI schema.

requirements.title: PostgreSQL persistence schema
requirements.acceptance: Database models/migrations include all required product tables.

requirements.title: SSE AgentStreamEvent streaming
requirements.acceptance: Chat route streams AgentStreamEvent variants and frontend consumes them.

requirements.title: Hermes runtime integration path
requirements.acceptance: Hermes runtime adapter uses Python AIAgent or CLI; status reports ready or blocked_missing_runtime, never mock-ready.

requirements.title: Hermes Skill files
requirements.acceptance: Required SKILL.md files exist and are synchronized under hermes_profile/skills.

requirements.title: Gemini ModelGateway real client
requirements.acceptance: Gemini client implements generateContent requests, streaming-compatible text responses, structured output, and real readiness validation if credentials exist.

requirements.title: Gemini reasoning/text compatibility
requirements.acceptance: Gemini text responses are normalized for ModelGateway consumers without exposing provider-specific reasoning_content behavior.

requirements.title: Gemini ImageGateway real client
requirements.acceptance: Gemini image client reads env config, generates/stores image assets when credentials exist, and reports truthful blocked status otherwise. image2 is optional compatibility only.

requirements.title: Hermes Orchestrator Agent
requirements.acceptance: orchestrator_agent.py exists, routes tasks, dispatches skills, emits trace events, records run/steps.

requirements.title: Profile Agent
requirements.acceptance: profile_agent.py extracts 8+ profile dimensions and writes profile memory with confidence/evidence.

requirements.title: Knowledge Agent
requirements.acceptance: knowledge_agent.py ingests course docs, builds chunks, knowledge points, prerequisite graph, source_refs.

requirements.title: Planner Agent
requirements.acceptance: planner_agent.py generates personalized path, locks, stages, resources, and replans after evaluation.

requirements.title: Recommender Agent
requirements.acceptance: recommender_agent.py ranks resources with reasons based on profile, weakness, goal, feedback.

requirements.title: Tutor Agent
requirements.acceptance: tutor_agent.py streams rich teacher chat, AppLinks, App event explanations, notes summaries, RAG-grounded answers.

requirements.title: App Canvas Agent
requirements.acceptance: app_canvas_agent.py creates/updates Apps, ChatAppLinks, handles App events and spatial memory.

requirements.title: Evaluator Agent
requirements.acceptance: evaluator_agent.py grades quizzes, updates mastery/misconception, triggers replanning.

requirements.title: Verifier Agent
requirements.acceptance: verifier_agent.py checks grounding, safety, schema, quiz consistency, code/image safety.

requirements.title: EduMemory Agent
requirements.acceptance: memory_agent.py orchestrates EduMem0 extraction/retrieval/update/conflict/decay and evidence.

requirements.title: Resource Bundle Agent
requirements.acceptance: resource_bundle_agent.py creates coordinated bundle with at least 5 resource types and verifier pass.

requirements.title: Document Skill
requirements.acceptance: Generates personalized Markdown document with source_refs and verifier result.

requirements.title: Mindmap Skill
requirements.acceptance: Generates Mermaid/Markmap mindmap with clickable nodes and weak point highlights.

requirements.title: Quiz Skill
requirements.acceptance: Generates multiple question types with answers, explanations, misconception tags, source_refs.

requirements.title: PPT Skill
requirements.acceptance: Generates PPT outline and pptx export with personalized slide structure.

requirements.title: Code Practice Skill
requirements.acceptance: Generates safe code lab with starter code, tests, expected output, explanation.

requirements.title: Image Generation Skill
requirements.acceptance: Plans image prompt through Hermes/Gemini and calls Gemini Image when credentials available, with overlay labels and safety.

requirements.title: Video Script Skill
requirements.acceptance: Generates storyboard, narration, keyframe prompts, animation steps.

requirements.title: Reading Material Skill
requirements.acceptance: Generates extension reading guide with recommendation reason and sources/unverified marker.

requirements.title: Notes Skill
requirements.acceptance: Summarizes Tutor Chat and App actions into Notes App with linked Apps.

requirements.title: Dashboard Skill
requirements.acceptance: Aggregates profile, mastery, memory evidence, path, recommendation, run trace.

requirements.title: Resource Bundle Skill
requirements.acceptance: Generates at least five personalized resources from Planner output.

requirements.title: App Generation Skill
requirements.acceptance: Converts resources into CanvasApps and creates ChatAppLinks.

requirements.title: Custom HTML App Skill
requirements.acceptance: Creates custom.html app payload for sandbox renderer; secondary path only.

requirements.title: Verifier Skill
requirements.acceptance: Callable verifier skill runs for every resource generation flow.

requirements.title: Memory Update Skill
requirements.acceptance: Writes chat, quiz, app, layout, feedback memories to EduMem0.

requirements.title: Course Ingestion Skill
requirements.acceptance: Parses course files and builds RAG chunks, knowledge points, prerequisites.

requirements.title: EduMem0 schema and persistence
requirements.acceptance: EduMemoryItem schema includes required fields and persists to PostgreSQL.

requirements.title: Memory types
requirements.acceptance: All required memory types implemented and queryable.

requirements.title: Confidence policy
requirements.acceptance: Confidence changes based on evidence type and repetition.

requirements.title: Decay policy
requirements.acceptance: Mastery/misconception decay and stable profile retention implemented.

requirements.title: Conflict resolver
requirements.acceptance: Contradictory evidence creates conflict decision and confidence updates.

requirements.title: Chat extraction writes profile memory
requirements.acceptance: Profile chat input creates profile memory and evidence.

requirements.title: Quiz updates mastery and misconception
requirements.acceptance: Quiz results write mastery/misconception memories.

requirements.title: App events update memory
requirements.acceptance: Demo/App interactions write app_interaction memory.

requirements.title: Spatial layout memory
requirements.acceptance: Drag/group/layout events write spatial_layout memory.

requirements.title: Dashboard memory evidence
requirements.acceptance: Dashboard displays evidence chain for profile/mastery/misconceptions.

requirements.title: Spatial canvas layout
requirements.acceptance: Left canvas and right Tutor Chat layout implemented with Chinese UI.

requirements.title: Free pan/zoom/drag/resize
requirements.acceptance: Canvas pan/zoom and App drag/resize work and persist.

requirements.title: App Dock/search/minimap/auto arrange
requirements.acceptance: Dock, search, minimap, auto arrange are functional.

requirements.title: AppLink Flight
requirements.acceptance: Clicking chat AppLink animates and focuses/opens target App.

requirements.title: App state transitions
requirements.acceptance: icon/card/window/fullscreen/split/minimized/focused states function.

requirements.title: Relationship connectors and frames
requirements.acceptance: Canvas supports App connectors and grouping frames.

requirements.title: ProfileDashboardApp
requirements.acceptance: Displays profile dimensions and evidence.

requirements.title: LearningPathApp
requirements.acceptance: Displays stages, locks, progress, resources; node click focuses/creates App.

requirements.title: KnowledgeGraph/Mindmap App
requirements.acceptance: Displays knowledge graph/mindmap; React Flow scoped internally only.

requirements.title: WorkEnergyDemoApp
requirements.acceptance: Controls update work/kinetic energy values and emit App event.

requirements.title: GradientDescentDemoApp
requirements.acceptance: Learning rate and iterations update curve/path/table and emit App event.

requirements.title: QuizPracticeApp
requirements.acceptance: Answer/submit/feedback/evaluator/dashboard loop works.

requirements.title: CodeLabApp
requirements.acceptance: Shows starter code, tests, explanation, safe execution warning/route.

requirements.title: NotesApp
requirements.acceptance: Creates and persists summary notes linked to Apps.

requirements.title: LearningDashboardApp
requirements.acceptance: Shows profile/mastery/weakness/recommendations/memory evidence/run trace.

requirements.title: PPTPreviewApp
requirements.acceptance: Previews generated slides and export metadata.

requirements.title: ImageExplanationApp
requirements.acceptance: Shows image asset with frontend overlay labels and teaching goal.

requirements.title: VideoScriptApp
requirements.acceptance: Shows storyboard, narration, keyframes, animation steps.

requirements.title: ResourceCenterApp
requirements.acceptance: Lists resources with filters, source_refs, verifier status.

requirements.title: Course ingestion and source_refs
requirements.acceptance: Seed course and uploaded docs are chunked, embedded, retrievable with source_refs.

requirements.title: Knowledge graph prerequisites
requirements.acceptance: Knowledge points and prerequisite edges are extracted and used by Planner.

requirements.title: Verifier grounding gate
requirements.acceptance: Resources without valid source_refs fail verifier.

requirements.title: Prompt injection/content safety
requirements.acceptance: Prompt injection and unsafe content are blocked or marked unsafe.

requirements.title: Code/image safety
requirements.acceptance: Unsafe code commands and unsafe image prompts fail.

requirements.title: CustomHtmlApp sandbox iframe
requirements.acceptance: CustomHtmlAppRenderer uses sandbox iframe, CSP, postMessage protocol.

requirements.title: Streaming widget stability
requirements.acceptance: Handles partial JSON/HTML/script, height cache, finalize no flicker, ready race fallback.
tests: vitest custom html streaming stability tests

requirements.title: Competition profile requirement
requirements.acceptance: Dialogue-based dynamic profile has >=6 dimensions and随学随新; implemented as 8+ dimensions.

requirements.title: Competition 5+ resource generation
requirements.acceptance: At least 5 personalized resource types generated by multi-agent/skill bundle.

requirements.title: Competition path and push
requirements.acceptance: Personalized path and resource push with recommendation reasons.

requirements.title: Competition intelligent tutoring
requirements.acceptance: Tutor Agent answers with text/App explanation/notes and RAG grounding.

requirements.title: Competition learning evaluation
requirements.acceptance: Quiz/evaluation updates memory, dashboard, path.

requirements.title: Competition anti-hallucination
requirements.acceptance: RAG/source_refs/verifier/safety gates implemented and tested.

requirements.title: Competition UX requirements
requirements.acceptance: Stream output, rich cards, no dead controls, progress trace, smooth animations.

requirements.title: Documentation package
requirements.acceptance: Docs include architecture, agents, memory, testing, competition traceability, licenses, provider declaration, demo script.

requirements.title: Required API routes exist
requirements.acceptance: All API routes listed in BACKEND_RUNTIME_REQUIRED.md exist and are tested.

requirements.title: Agent run trace API
requirements.acceptance: /api/agent-runs/{run_id} returns run and steps for frontend trace display.

requirements.title: Canvas app API persistence
requirements.acceptance: Canvas App create/update/event routes persist and return typed schema.

requirements.title: Memory API retrieval
requirements.acceptance: Memory search/extract/update routes function with persistent store.

requirements.title: Dashboard API aggregation
requirements.acceptance: Dashboard API aggregates profile, path, mastery, memory evidence, recommendations, traces.

requirements.title: Image generation API
requirements.acceptance: Image generation API routes through Gemini Image gateway or returns blocked status without fake success.

requirements.title: Course document API
requirements.acceptance: Course document upload/ingest API builds RAG data and source_refs.

requirements.title: Streaming progress trace
requirements.acceptance: Long-running generation shows run.step/progress events, not blank waiting.

requirements.title: No enabled dead controls
requirements.acceptance: Every enabled button/control has a working action; incomplete actions are disabled with reason.

requirements.title: Reduced motion fallback
requirements.acceptance: AppLink Flight and transitions respect prefers-reduced-motion.

requirements.title: Chinese-first UI
requirements.acceptance: Main UI labels and flows are Chinese by default while preserving technical terms as needed.

requirements.title: Resource cards in chat
requirements.acceptance: Tutor Chat renders generated resource cards and AppLink chips from stream events.

requirements.title: WorkEnergy App event to Tutor explanation
requirements.acceptance: Changing WorkEnergy parameters can trigger Tutor explanation with current values.

requirements.title: Learning path node to App focus
requirements.acceptance: Clicking a learning path stage/resource focuses or creates linked App.

requirements.title: Layout/group event to spatial memory
requirements.acceptance: Dragging/grouping Apps creates spatial_layout memory and dashboard evidence.

requirements.title: RUN_REPORT evidence
requirements.acceptance: RUN_REPORT.md lists commands, ports, readiness, test results, external integration status, and no secret values.

requirements.title: Blocked report semantics
requirements.acceptance: If external integration blocked, BLOCKED_REAL_INTEGRATION_REPORT.md lists exact blockers and product is not marked complete.

requirements.title: Open-source license inventory
requirements.acceptance: docs/open_source_licenses.md lists all open-source dependencies, source, license, and purpose.

requirements.title: Provider declaration
requirements.acceptance: docs/provider_declaration.md declares Gemini text, Gemini Image, Hermes, Mem0/EduMem0, optional compatibility providers, and credential handling.

requirements.title: Demo script
requirements.acceptance: docs/demo_script.md provides a 7-minute competition demo flow covering profile, path, resources, AppLink, quiz, dashboard.

requirements.title: Secret safety
requirements.acceptance: No real API keys in repo; .env ignored; secret scan runs.

requirements.title: Custom HTML sandbox network block
requirements.acceptance: CustomHtmlApp iframe blocks network by default and intercepts links.

requirements.title: Code practice sandbox policy
requirements.acceptance: CodeLab does not execute untrusted arbitrary code in backend process; sandbox policy documented/tested.

requirements.title: TypeScript/Python protocol compatibility
requirements.acceptance: Shared app protocol JSON fixtures validate against TS and Python schemas.

requirements.title: AgentStreamEvent variants
requirements.acceptance: All required AgentStreamEvent variants are implemented and handled by frontend.

requirements.title: ChatAppLink schema and persistence
requirements.acceptance: ChatAppLink schema exists in TS/Python and persists in database.

requirements.title: Full validation script
requirements.acceptance: scripts/run_full_validation.sh executes backend, frontend, E2E, no-mock, secret scan, requirement verification.

requirements.title: Requirement results generated
requirements.acceptance: validation/requirement_results.json contains one pass result per requirement ID.

requirements.title: CI workflow optional but present
requirements.acceptance: A GitHub Actions or equivalent CI workflow runs the validation commands, or docs explain local-only environment limitation.
